data.summary: Resolved 'Magnolia Home & Garden' as Customer C-8001. Generated text summary from CRM and Reports data.

closingText.text:
Magnolia Home & Garden (C-8001) is a VIP customer based on the West Coast, managed by Heman Bhullar. Their lifetime revenue stands at $482,350 with payment status current. Revenue has been trending upward — April's $46,350 is 12.4% above the Q1 monthly average. They have 2 open orders and a current balance of $18,200 against a $75,000 credit limit.

There are 4 open tasks, the most urgent being a Q2 catalog follow-up due April 28 and a claim review (CLM-0892) due April 30. The showroom site visit is scheduled for May 5.

Overall, Magnolia is a healthy, growing account with no red flags — but the two near-due tasks need attention this week.
